items.title: Jeff Teague REACTS to Draymond Green’s OUTTA POCKET comments about PUNCHING Jordan Poole in head
items.author: Club 520 Podcast
items.body_excerpt: Jeff Teague, DJ Wells, and B Hen react to Draymond Green going on ‘The Pivot’ to talk about when he punched teammate Jordan Poole in the head a few years ago with the Golden State Warriors. The guys talk about how Draymond’s comments are outta pocket, saying that he didn’t know…
